Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema.JsonSchema

Packages that use JsonSchema
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects

  • Uses of JsonSchema in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema

    Subclasses of JsonSchema in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonSchemaProperty
    Represents a JSON property in the JSON-Schema core specification.
    class 
    JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray
    Convenience class for representing a property that's an array of simple types.
    class 
    JsonSchemaRef
    Convenience class for representing a schema reference such as "{'$ref':'/url/to/ref'}".

    JsonSchemaMap.load(URI uri)
    Subclasses must implement either this method or JsonSchemaMap.getReader(URI) to load the schema with the specified URI.

    JsonSchema.of(Class<?> type)
    Generates a JsonSchema bean from the specified class using JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.DEFAULT.
